name: Claude Connectors
tagline: Connect Claude to your favorite tools and workflows
description: Claude Connectors enables seamless integration between Claude AI and popular business applications, allowing you to extend Claude's capabilities across your existing workflow. The tool provides pre-built connectors that handle authentication, data syncing, and API communication automatically. Designed for teams and developers who want to leverage Claude's intelligence without building custom integrations from scratch.
pros: Extends Claude functionality across multiple platforms
